results.title: Faith, fear and trust: Inside DR Congo’s fight against Ebola
results.description: By Vibhu Mishra and Cristina Silveiro In a village in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), health workers arrived a few days ago to help bury a person who had died from Ebola. Instead, they were threatened, told armed rebels would be called if they stayed, and forced to leave. The family carried out the [...] The post Faith, fear and trust: Inside DR Congo’s fight against Ebola appeared first on Caribbean News Global .
